title: Moteshwar Mahadev
tagline: Moteshwar Mahadev — spiritual town of Uttarakhand

overview.short: Shree Moteshwar Mahadev, also known as Shree Bheem Shankar Mahadev, is an abode of Lord Shiva in Kashipur of Uttarakhand state, India.
overview.description: Shree Moteshwar Mahadev, also known as Shree Bheem Shankar Mahadev, is an abode of Lord Shiva in Kashipur of Uttarakhand state, India. This place was known as the Dakini State in ancient days. Kashipur (Govishn) is a historic place in Udham Singh Nagar district. Around 1 km away is a place known as Ujjanak.

topPlaces.name: Sahaspur
topPlaces.description: Sahaspur is a town and a nagar panchayat in Bijnor district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Kanth, Moradabad
topPlaces.description: Kanth is a Nagar Palika Parishad in Moradabad district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is home to small-scale bandage manufacturing industries.

topPlaces.name: Chelapur
topPlaces.description: Chelapur is a village and gram panchayat in Chandpur tehsil, Bijnor District, in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

items.note: Sahaspur is a town and a nagar panchayat in Bijnor district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.
Kanth is a Nagar Palika Parishad in Moradabad district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is home to small-scale bandage manufacturing industries.
Chelapur is a village and gram panchayat in Chandpur tehsil, Bijnor District, in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Moteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: The best time to visit Moteshwar Mahadev is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Moteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pantnagar Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Moradabad Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Moteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Moteshwar Mahadev at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Moteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: Stays in Moteshwar Mahadev start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Moteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sahaspur, Kanth, Moradabad, Chelapur.
